name: Turkey/Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: Salt and cayenne pepper to taste
8 ounces Vermicelli pasta, broken and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop chicken (or turkey) and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté mushrooms, onions, and celery in 2 tablespoons olive oil until tender.
3. In a separate saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Add flour and tapioca flour, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Gradually whisk in chicken broth and milk, cooking until the mixture thickens.
5. Stir in sherry, dried thyme, dried parsley, garlic powder, salt, and cayenne pepper. Adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Combine cooked pasta with sauce, chopped meat, mushrooms, celery, and Parmesan cheese.
7. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and sprinkle additional Parmesan on top.
8. Place under the broiler until bubbly and slightly golden on top (do not overbrown; the sauce may become bitter).
9. Allow the casserole to cool for a few minutes before serving.
